channel.title: Proxmox Configure :: SE How-To Build Lab
channel.description: Create VNETs ​ from PVE Shell cd /root ​ from PVE Shell curl https://raw.githubusercontent.com/fortinet/Field-SE-Lab-OOB/refs/heads/main/automation/proxmox/Create_VNETs.sh > Create_VNETs.sh ​ from PVE Shell chmod 777 Create_VNETs.sh ​ from PVE Shell ./Create_VNETs.sh
